metadata.title: Death Rates by Medical Cause metadata
metadata.description: Analysis of death statistics by medical cause in respect of GNCTD for year 2024
metadata.data_source: Civil Registration System (CRS) - death registration records with medically certified cause of death
metadata.key_statistics: Vital Statistics related to Deaths by Cause
metadata.remarks: Based on CRS registered deaths with medically certified causes; completeness depends on MCCD coverage and registration quality

dataset_inventory_list.title: DEATHS BY CAUSE OF DEATHS, AGE AND SEX FOR ALL DEATHS (MEDICALLY CERTIFIED OR NOT)
dataset_inventory_list.short_description: Deaths by cause of deaths, age and sex for all deaths (medically certified or not) in Delhi, 2024.
dataset_inventory_list.long_description: Deaths by cause of deaths, age and sex for all deaths (medically certified or not). Imported from 2024 Delhi Birth and Death registration workbook, Table D-10.

dataset_inventory_list.title: DEATHS BY CAUSE OF DEATHS, AGE AND SEX FOR MEDICALLY CERTIFIED DEATHS
dataset_inventory_list.short_description: Deaths by cause of deaths, age and sex for medically certified deaths in Delhi, 2024. Detailed ICD-10 breakdown.
dataset_inventory_list.long_description: Deaths by cause of deaths, age and sex for medically certified deaths only. Hierarchical breakdown by ICD-10 major categories, sub-categories and specific diseases. Imported from 2024 Delhi Birth and Death registration workbook, Table D-11.

cause_of_death_icd10: Diseases of the Blood & Blood Forming Organs and Certain Disorders Involving the Immune Mechanism (D50-D89)
Diseases of the Eye and Adnexa (H00-H59)
Diseases of the Ear and Mastoid Process (H60-H95)
Diseases of the Skin and Subcutaneous Tissue (L00-L98)
Diseases of the Musculoskeletal System Connective Tissue (M00-M99)
Certain Conditions Originating in the Perinatal Period (P00-P96)
Symptoms, Signs and Abnormal Clinical & Laboratory Findings N.E.C. (R00-R99)
Injury, Poisoning and Certain Other Consequences of External Causes (S00-T98)
External Causes of Morbidity and Mortality (V01-Y89)
